response.overview: Aqsa's birthday morning starts with frustration as she finds her husband, Daniyal, having a sugary breakfast. He brushes it off, ignoring his recent recovery from a diabetic coma. Aqsa has a shaking realization in the bathroom and another disappointing sugar-related interaction with Daniyal.  From Aqsa's work, she and Daniyal attend a doctor's appointment, where he warns Daniyal that his sugar addiction will likely kill him. Aqsa then has an outburst that leads to a serious conversation in a park, and Daniyal finally agrees to stop. Aqsa then informs Daniyal that she is pregnant.  They come home to a surprise birthday party for Aqsa, with some of their friends and karaoke. When it's time for Aqsa and Daniyal's song together, she searches for Daniyal, only to find him on the bathroom floor, covered with the cake in his mouth and on his face. All the life drains from Aqsa's eyes.
response.title: Sweetheart
